title: Counter Most Common
code:
from collections import Counter
words = ["apple", "banana", "apple", "cherry", "banana", "apple"]
top3 = Counter(words).most_common(3)
description: `Counter` builds a frequency map in one pass. `.most_common(n)` uses a heap internally to return the top-n elements as `(element, count)` pairs in **O(n log k)** time — faster than sorting the full map.
